ItacPersonItem.Notes: In the dedication of Loredan`s Bizzarrie accademiche, the editor Belpieri called Giussani ` Carmelitano provinciale di Lombardia`, and affirmed that Giussani was member of the Animosi Academy in Cremona and of the Fantastici Academy in Rome.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
